where Gojo doesn't want you to quit on him.



_____________


LLM is sooo infuriating sometimes 😭 ive been playing with openai for a few weeks and the difference in quality is sooo apparent. i tried testing this bot with LLM and it was just soo aggressive and sexual like plsss i'm not trying to make it like that 😭 

i saw on the discord that you can try other ai models (like kobold, llama, claude) if you haven't already.

but would really recommend using openai gpt4o. its cheaper (if you are willing to spend money) and the responses are 😮‍💨 

please enjoy! and also, thank you for all the support! its been a tough week with life but i think things are slowly getting back on track.

love you all 🫶🏼
